title: The Operator's Lens
description: Hierarchy-of-Controls hazard perception. The cost of looking is real, and the looking can fail honestly.

narrative_binding.biographyChapterTitle: Chapter II — The Teaching of Sight, and the First Looking.
narrative_binding.biographyChapterVoice: the maker, descending into the Inner Chamber

hierarchy_of_controls.doctrine: remove the hazard from the room before it can act
exchange one death for a lesser
place a wall between a man and the thing that would kill him
rewrite the order of the shift so the man is not present
armor the man against what could not be removed, swapped, walled, or scheduled around
